title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: ca-certificates bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for ca-certificates is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The ca-certificates package contains a set of Certificate Authority (CA) certificates chosen by the Mozilla Foundation for use with the Internet Public Key Infrastructure (PKI).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): ca-certificates: revert changes introduced by "dropping od cert.pem" change now postopend to RHEL-11 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-109484)  Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118488)

full_text:
An update for ca-certificates is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The ca-certificates package contains a set of Certificate Authority (CA) certificates chosen by the Mozilla Foundation for use with the Internet Public Key Infrastructure (PKI).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): ca-certificates: revert changes introduced by "dropping od cert.pem" change now postopend to RHEL-11 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-109484)  Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118488)
